title: Scythite Adventures
description: Cool mod adding cool weapons, armor, and more! Still has a lot more to add...👀
body:
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/4hjlB2fBIZ8" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>Dragged from the depths of time and space, an item said to hold true power! This mod adds many things, as shown below:

- Adds A New Ore (Scythite)
- Adds Scythite Armor And Tools!
- Adds A Painting (Scythite Revelations)
- Adds A Longsword!
- Adds a Broadsword!
- And More!

The Ancient Isles are rising, and bringing new structures and biomes to the surface... 👀

Also make sure to join the discord server for news early!
